web_results.title: YouTube Monetisation Changes in 2026: What Creators Need to Know
web_results.description: The platform's maturation means eligibility barriers higher (1,000 subscribers + 4,000 watch hours OR 1,000 subscribers + 10 million Shorts views within 90 days) but revenue opportunities larger for compliant creators (total creator payouts increased 35% year-over-year as advertising sophistication and premium subscriptions grow), with successful 2026 strategies involving hybrid approaches: Shorts for discovery and daily touchpoints (3–7 weekly uploads building algorithmic momentum), long-form for monetisation and depth (1–3 weekly uploads maximizing revenue per engaged viewer), and systematic production workflows (Clippie AI batch creation, repurposing systems, strategic automation) enabling the volume-quality balance required for sustainable six-figure YouTube income without creator burnout.
